chinese_news.title: 增长停滞两年后，H&M重组全球架构，大中华区降级｜独家
chinese_news.summary:
文｜贺哲馨

编辑｜乔芊

36氪独家获悉，瑞典快时尚巨头H&M正在推进一场波及全球的组织架构调整：原本按地理划分的9大区域业务板块被打散，重新拆分为26个销售市场，并以市场表现为依据归入四个新设立的“洲级”事业部管辖。

大中华区在这轮调整中降级为26个销售市场之一，归属新成立的亚太洲级事业部（Continent Asia Pacific）管理。原大中华区总裁司懿德（Saed El-Achkar）将出任该事业部董事总经理（Managing Director），任命预计在6月25日集团半年报发布前后正式对外公布，新架构于7月1日落地运转。

除大中华区外，亚太事业部还管辖东南亚（总部吉隆坡）、东北亚（东京）、印度（班加罗尔）、澳大利亚和新西兰（悉尼）

chinese_news.title: 高瓴出手了一家消费级柔性机器人公司，要把“大白”从电影搬进现实家庭｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，消费级柔性机器人公司SoulX日前已完成数千万元天使轮融资，投资方为高瓴创投，向阳资本担任独家财务顾问。资金将重点投入产品持续迭代、技术研发，并加快供应链与规模化交付体系搭建。首款机器人产品MoYa将于2026年下半年正式发布。

SoulX隶属于深圳市弘火智能科技有限公司，团队长期专注于柔性机器人技术与睡眠、压力与家庭健康关护。公司以睡眠场景为切入点，自主研发了睡眠安抚机器人MoYa。该产品融合机器人技术、神经科学与心理学，采用无摄像头设计，通过模拟拥抱帮助用户缓解身心压力。

家庭场景下的情感与健康关护，长期面临一个“人机关系”设计上的根本问题：在需要身心双重安抚的场景里，机器应该以怎样的方式“在场”？

过去几年，不同产品从多个维度给出答案。智能床垫、白噪音机擅长改善环境与生理舒适度；可穿戴设备精于睡眠数据的连续监测；毛绒玩具在情绪投射与安全感的建立上有天然优势；新兴的AI对话机器人则在更自然的表达，促进沟通方面快速迭代。

触觉安抚传递物

chinese_news.title: 曼联，要被卖了
chinese_news.summary:
图片来源：视觉中国

作者/余梦莹

报道/投资界PEdaily

史上最盛大世界杯正在上演。

48支球队、39天、104场比赛，总奖金飙升至8.71亿美元。梅西、C罗、莫德里奇“最后一舞”，哈兰德、姆巴佩、亚马尔崛起，诸神之战拉开帷幕。

赛场之外，一家老牌足球豪门却站在了十字路口——彭博社消息，掌控英超球队曼联超20年的格雷泽家族内部，近期正在讨论出售事宜。

绰号“红魔”，这是英格兰足球史上最富盛名的豪门。

chinese_news.title: 36氪研究院 | AI时代留学就业白皮书：中国留学生全球就业趋势与人才价值重塑
chinese_news.summary:
在AI浪潮重塑全球产业逻辑的当下，传统留学路径所依赖的学历溢价与信息差正在系统性失效，大量高薪专业的基础性任务面临被AI批量化替代的风险。70/80后家长遭遇教育投资回报率骤降，05后年轻一代则陷入人机协同时代“何以确立自身不可替代价值”的身份焦虑。面对旧共识瓦解、新航线未明的历史性分水岭，36氪研究院与新通教育联合发布《AI时代留学就业白皮书：中国留学生全球就业趋势与人才价值重塑》。白皮书基于新通三十年积累的百万级家庭服务数据及36氪研究院对2030年全球新兴产业集群的前瞻研判，倡导回归全生命周期的长期主义，为留学家庭提供一份客观、中立的未来就业生存指南。

从“向外破局”到“向内扎根”：中国留学生三十年心理变迁史

中国留学行业三十年，其底层逻辑是一部中产家庭的教育焦虑与价值观重塑史。留学意义经历了五个阶段的变迁——从生存驱动、打破信息垄断的拓荒破冰，到追逐名校光环的晋升通道，再到就业预期前置的工具理性内卷，继而转入风险规避与心理议题凸显的疫情重塑期，直至当下AI浪潮中意义感赤字、情感支撑成为刚需的新阶段。

chinese_news.summary:
越来越多CVC在路上

作者 | 冯晓亭 

 编辑 | 吾人

chinese_news.title: 读懂SpaceX的两万亿故事：为什么马斯克每一手棋，永远都可以提前摆好？
chinese_news.summary:
飞向宇宙、浩瀚无垠

作者｜曹思颀

编辑｜靖宇

6 月 12 日，在 SpaceX 正式挂牌当天，马斯克选择前往得州的星舰基地，和数百名员工一起，远程敲响了纳斯达克的开市钟。

在现场，他用熟悉的那股自嘲范儿说：「如果当年有人告诉我会有今天，我大概率觉得那个人嗑嗨了。因为当时我自己都认为这家公司会黄。」

这一天，SpaceX 正式登陆纳斯达克，发行价 135 美元，募资约 750 亿美元；

chinese_news.title: 突发！Anthropic全球停用Claude 5
chinese_news.summary:
究竟为何，Anthropic突然下线了地表最强Claude？

【导读】上线72小时，最强Claude Fable 5被一纸禁令全球下架，连Anthropic自家外籍员工都不许碰。

太突然了！

就在刚刚，Anthropic官宣——

全球禁用外籍人士对Claude Fable 5和Mythos 5的所有访问权限。

无论是在美国境内还是境外，就连Anthropic的外籍员工，全都不可用。

上线才3天的Clau

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 核心材料成本降至进口材料五分之一，电致变色技术厂商获投，车规级产线建设中
chinese_news.summary:
硬氪获悉，中科电墨近日完成数千万元Pre-A轮融资，由西安龙鼎投资独家投资。本轮融资将主要用于车规级电致变色产线建设、核心材料研发迭代以及汽车领域市场拓展。

伴随新能源汽车向智能化、舒适化方向升级，汽车玻璃正从传统结构件逐步演变为集隔热、防晒、隐私保护和交互体验于一体的功能件。尤其是全景天幕快速普及后，调光玻璃开始成为车企提升产品差异化的重要配置之一。

目前市场主流调光技术主要包括PDLC（液晶调光）、SPD（悬浮粒子调光）以及EC（电致变色）三种路线。PDLC和SPD主要依靠光散射实现遮蔽效果，普遍存在雾度较高、隔热能力有限、驱动电压较高等问题。而电致变色技术则通过材料发生氧化还原反应，实现玻璃透光率变化，不仅能够实现连续调光，同时具备低雾度、低能耗以及隔绝红外热辐射等优势，被认为是下一代智能玻璃的重要技术路线之一。

中科电墨成立于2023年，专注于电致变色核心材料及器件研发。公司首席科学家马明明博士长期从事导电高分子材料研究，于2017年成功研发出相关核心材料体系。通过引入自主设计的导电聚合物材料，中科电墨突破了长期由海外

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will US-Iran peace deal be signed by 2026-05-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump announced Sunday signing (2026-05-05) but Iran contradicted timing; market uncertainty on actual execution within 30 days is high-volume arbitrage opportunity.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC, BBC, CoinDesk (Bitcoin rallied on deal proximity); geopolitical resolution directly moves oil, USD, risk assets.

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC just crossed $65K on Iran deal optimism and SpaceX IPO excitement; macro traders pricing Hormuz reopening (energy deflation) and tokenized treasury growth ($14.6B markets signal institutional crypto shift).
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (BTC $64K+, Pakistan PM statement), Wall Street tokenization surge, SpaceX $1.3B bitcoin reserve disclosed.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed cut rates at least once by 2026-09-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Social Security COLA 2027 estimate 4.7% signals persistent inflation; G7 meeting (Trump attending) likely to surface global policy divergence; rate derivatives deeply repriced on Iran deal stabilization.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (inflation-driven COLA forecast), BBC (G7 Russia/Ukraine agenda), macro macro volatility.

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Wall Street moving 'deeper into Ethereum' per Etherealize founder; tokenized treasury markets ($14.6B) running on Ethereum infra; quantum-proofing cost (7 cents) narrative bullish for L1 security upgrade demand.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (Wall Street Ethereum pivot), Cointelegraph (quantum-proof accounts), SEC tokenization rule clarity improving.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Anthropic's Claude 5 re-launch globally by 2026-06-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: 36Kr broke global Claude 5 halt (Chinese media first); Amazon warning triggered US crackdown per Cointelegraph; regulatory limbo creates short-term odds mispricing on resolution speed.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: 36Kr exclusive (global Claude 5 stoppage), Cointelegraph (Amazon-triggered US crackdown), Meta/Zuckerberg AI underperformance context.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the Strait of Hormuz formally reopen to all shipping (zero blockade incidents) for 30+ consecutive days by 2026-08-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: US Energy Information Administration (EIA) shipping reports, IMRO vessel tracking, Trump/State Dept statements
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Markets pricing binary on deal signature but not on enforcement durability; 30-day operational threshold is harder to clear than signed agreement, yet betting volume on actual enforcement is sparse.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Trump's explicit 'open to all' language in Iran negotiation; Strait blockade has driven 15% of BTC volatility since 2024; reopening deflates oil, rebounds equities.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will SpaceX's bitcoin reserve grow to $2 billion or more by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SpaceX quarterly filings, regulatory disclosures, Elon Musk public statements on bitcoin strategy
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: IPO just closed (May 2026); reserve currently $1.3B per CoinDesk; growth path to $2B hinges on BTC price AND accumulation strategy, both uncertain; little retail/institution betting on reserve expansion specifically.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: SpaceX IPO catalyst validates space-tech-crypto narrative; Google partnership (Musk/Page alignment per CNBC) suggests Google may follow tokenization/BTC allocation; M&A/treasury allocation announcements likely Q3-Q4 2026.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the total market cap of tokenized US treasuries exceed $50 billion by 2027-03-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinDesk on-chain tracking, Chainalysis, RWA aggregators (Goldfinch, Centrifuge dashboards)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Currently $14.6B per CoinDesk; SEC clarity improving (big swing, though not full rule yet); institutional demand (Wall Street deepening Ethereum adoption) is real but market underestimates 3x growth in 10 months.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: SEC tokenization path opening; $14.6B already deployed in 2026 suggests 3x multiplier plausible by Q1 2027; BlackRock/Fidelity entry would accelerate.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will at least one Fortune 500 company announce a bitcoin reserve >$500M by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC Form 8-K filings, company earnings calls, press releases, Twitter
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: SpaceX ($1.3B) precedent and Musk's Google alignment suggest mimicry cycle; crypto institutional adoption narrative strong; yet specific binary on Fortune 500 bitcoin reserve announcement lacks volume.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: SpaceX IPO just priced; Microsoft/Apple/Nvidia decisions on treasury allocation pending; tax reform/TCJA expiration (2025 actual, but 2026 renewal risk) may spur hedging asset allocation.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the ETH/BTC ratio close above 0.065 on 2026-09-30?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, Kraken/Coinbase ETH/BTC spot price on settlement date
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Currently tilted BTC-heavy on macro flight-to-safety (Iran deal rally = risk-on, but Fed policy uncertainty lingers); Wall Street pivoting deeper into Ethereum (tokenization, staking yield) is underpriced in ratio betting.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: 'Wall Street moving deeper into Ethereum'; tokenized treasury growth (~15% annualized growth to $50B) runs on ETH; Shanghai upgrade Q4 2026 yields narrative; BTC dominance will compress as alts recover.

investment_theses.thesis: Iran peace deal (expect 2026-05-31 closure) triggers energy supply normalization → oil down 8-12% → deflationary impulse flows to growth equities (QQQ, NVDA) and BTC as macro hedge.
supporting_signals: Trump G7 attendance, explicit 'Hormuz open to all' language (CNBC, Cointelegraph)
Bitcoin rally above $64K on deal proximity (CoinDesk, Cointelegraph)
Oil forwards already pricing Strait reopening (BP, Shell positioning)
SPX growth rotation: energy underperformance, tech outperformance expected post-deal
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran re-reneges or phased withdrawal delays implementation; deal fails to close by May 31 or June 30, resurrecting volatility and risk-off bid for commodities/USD.
investment_theses.expression: Long QQQ (or NVDA directly), short USO crude ETF, long BTC perps; construct 60/30/10 allocation, unwind 50% on first 5% oil decline below $75/bbl.

investment_theses.thesis: Wall Street institutional capital flowing into Ethereum (and Ethereum-native RWA tokenization) outpaces Bitcoin this cycle; ETH/BTC ratio re-rates from 0.055 to 0.070+ by Q4 2026.
supporting_signals: Etherealize founder: 'Wall Street moving past pilots, deeper into Ethereum' (CoinDesk)
Tokenized treasury markets hit $14.6B, Ethereum is primary rail (CoinDesk)
SEC tokenization path clearing, benefiting on-chain settlement (CoinDesk: 'big swing')
Aerodrome upgrade: liquidity → prediction markets signal Ethereum DeFi expansion
investment_theses.counter_view: Bitcoin dominance resumes on macro macro flight-to-safety; Fed doesn't cut, USD strengthens, alts bleed into Q4 2026; Ethereum execution risk on Shanghai upgrade delays.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH spot (or ETH/USD call spreads), short BTC perps at 2:1 hedge ratio; or direct ETH/BTC ratio long via dydx/Hyperliquid perps (HYPE token trending) on 3-4x leverage.

investment_theses.thesis: SpaceX IPO success (just closed, $1.3B BTC reserve disclosed) accelerates corporate bitcoin allocation cycle; expect 5–10 Fortune 500 announcements by Q4 2026, driving BTC >$70K by summer.
supporting_signals: SpaceX IPO just priced; Musk-Google alignment per CNBC narrative suggests cultural shift in tech M&A treasuries
Bitcoin rallied on SpaceX IPO announcement (CoinDesk market color)
$1.3B reserve signals board-level confidence in BTC as strategic asset
Tax reform (2025 TCJA sunset fears now 2026 renewal cycle) incentivizes diversified hedges
investment_theses.counter_view: Corporate BTC adoption stays boutique (only Musk circle); broader board resistance to volatility; SEC/IRS crackdown on corporate crypto holdings dampens announcements.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot (or BTC Dec 2026 futures on CME), accumulate on any $65K dips; alternatively, long SPY (S&P tech bias) with call spread on BTC >$75K by 2026-12-31.

investment_theses.thesis: Federal Reserve cut cycle begins 2026-07 or 2026-09 (inflation moderates below 2.5%) due to Iran deal energy deflation + Hormuz normalization → USD weakens 3–5% → EM currencies, gold, BTC rally together.
supporting_signals: Social Security COLA 2027 estimated 4.7% signals sticky inflation now, but energy deflationary shock incoming (CNBC)
Oil futures pricing Hormuz reopening by summer (embedded in current 70–75/bbl range)
Trump G7 attendance likely to surface policy divergence; Fed already under pressure from White House on rates
DXY (US Dollar Index) at 20-month highs; USD strength unsustainable if Fed cuts
investment_theses.counter_view: Inflation re-accelerates (wage stickiness, AI capex), Fed holds; USD strengthens further, hurting EM and BTC. Geopolitical escalation (Israel-Lebanon, Ukraine) re-introduces risk-off bid.
investment_theses.expression: Long gold (GLD), long EM currency ETF (EEM), long BTC perps; short DXY spot or DXY call spreads. Construct equal-weight 3-way hedge; first target: DXY below 98, gold above $2,500, BTC above $70K.

investment_theses.thesis: Anthropic Claude 5 global halt (36Kr exclusive, Amazon warning triggered US crackdown) creates temporary competitive moat for OpenAI and Google (Gemini). Expect policy resolution by Q3 2026 → Claude re-launch → NVIDIA AI chip demand resilience confirmed.
supporting_signals: 36Kr broke Claude 5 global shutdown first (Chinese media lead on regulatory action)
Amazon warning → US crackdown per Cointelegraph (real regulatory event, not rumor)
Meta/Zuckerberg AI underwhelming; AI talent/capital consolidating into OpenAI + Google + Anthropic
NVDA depends on AI model deployment velocity; clarity on Anthropic regulatory path de-risks chip cycle
investment_theses.counter_view: Anthropic faces extended ban (regulatory capture by OpenAI competitors); Claude market share erodes; NVDA demand softens. Or, Anthropic successfully challenges regulation, re-launch stalls into Q4 2026.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA calls (Jul/Aug 2026 expirations) on any 5% dip; or long NVDA spot at support ($900–920 range). Short puts (sell 850-strike puts) to collect premium and build long on dip. Size: max 2–3% of portfolio risk.
